input.command:
git checkout -- cli/internal/server/frontend/build/index.html && git add cli/internal/server/frontend/e2e/beads.spec.ts cli/internal/server/frontend/src/lib/components/BeadDetail.svelte && git commit -m "$(cat <<'EOF'
fix(ui): truncate long bead ids in detail header, add copy button [ddx-71fbe968]

The bead-id span used shrink-0, so long ids visually overlapped the
action buttons in the detail header. Replace shrink-0 with
truncate min-w-0, add a title attribute for hover-discoverable full
id, and add a copy-to-clipboard icon button next to the id.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)"

data.text: Committed. BeadDetail header now truncates long bead ids, exposes the full id via `title` and a copy-to-clipboard button, and keeps the action buttons un-overlapped. New Playwright tests cover the 60-char reporter example and lengths 8/32/60/120.
